title: Big-picture data model: generic tickâ†’epicâ†’project hierarchy + target_date
description:
Implement the data-model foundation from docs/design/big-picture-tracking-projects-and-hierarchy.md.

Generic recursive containment (any tick may contain ticks); role derivation (tick / epic / bucket / project); explicit epic marker = orchestration opt-in (grouping vs orchestration, Â§1); project = container-of-containers; recursive progress rollup; target_date field (precise ISO day, Â§4) with DERIVED overdue/on-track slip; plus the tk surface. Backwards-compat is about execution: simple epics and project-less roadmaps behave exactly as today.

Note (config.md): schema edits must run make codegen-go AND make codegen-ts and commit regenerated output.

Deliverables:
- target_date schema field + struct + validation
- role-derivation helpers (container detection; epic/bucket/project/empty-epic)
- recursive descendant progress rollup
- derived slip signal (overdue / on-track)
- tk create/update --target-date
- tk list --overdue/--due-before + sort by target_date
- project-aware roadmap render (walk hierarchy; buckets excluded from orchestration nodes)
- all existing roadmap/epic tests still green
